; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %merge_1 = alloca i32
  %merge_3 = alloca i32
  %t0 = add i32 0, 1
  store i32 %t0, ptr %merge_1
  %t1 = add i32 0, 1
  store i32 %t1, ptr %merge_3
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t2 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  %t3 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t4 = add i32 %t2, %t3
  %t5 = add i32 0, 100
  %t6 = icmp slt i32 %t4, %t5
  br i1 %t6, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  %t7 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  %t8 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t9 = add i32 %t7, %t8
  %t10 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  store i32 %t10, ptr %merge_1
  store i32 %t9, ptr %merge_3
  br label %bb1
bb3:
  %t11 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t11)
  ret i32 0
}
